objective: Per-cell execution-mode switch driven by the Scope A T4 drift gradient with paired-leg inverse logic: on cells where the favorite leg drifts UP by >= X cents (a resting below-anchor maker bid will be swept past, not filled cheaply), CROSS IMMEDIATELY as a marketable taker to lock entry; elsewhere keep maker-wait. NET of the 1c taker fee on every crossed entry. Tests whether execution-mode conditioning on the drift gradient beats v3.

sources.scope_a_premarket_drift: T4 mid-drift gradient (per-regime), read from data

method: Per-cell drift threshold X swept over {3,4,5,6} cents. The drift-trigger fires on 8 heavy-favorite cells (r75_84 / r85_94). Crossed entries pay a flat 1c taker fee; maker-wait entries pay 0. Drift read from data reproduces the Scope A T4 gradient within 0.19 cents (gate PASS).

drift_reproduction.verdict: PASS - drift read from data matches Scope A T4 within 0.19c

headline.verdict: NEGATIVE - every threshold is net-negative; best (>=4c) nets 10.266% vs v3 10.514% = -0.248pp.

structural_insight: Cross-taker buys a ~1c-cheaper entry on the cohort it touches (75.84c vs 76.82c) but (a) the ~1c is eaten by the 1c taker fee, and (b) on triggered-exit events the cheaper entry does not flow to the realized +X anyway (atlas fixed-profit exit cap). The 8 favorite cells net -$191.1. See path_c_arc_findings.md Section 4/6 and LESSONS A43.
supersedes: Original binary Phase 3 (fixed 55c cross-favorites cutoff) found the cross-mode favorite entry at 67.3c ~ v3's 67.4c (no improvement); held unpromoted, superseded by this corrected per-cell drift-driven version.

validation_gates.gate_drift_repro: PASS - drift within 0.19c of Scope A T4.
validation_gates.gate6_material_roi: NOT CLEARED (documented negative, not a STOP) - best net -0.248pp vs v3; execution-mode switching is net-negative under the 1c fee + exit cap.

recommendation: DO NOT promote to policy. Execution-mode conditioning on the drift gradient is net-negative. The deployable lever remains the static per-cell offset (Path B v4 T47, +1.024pp net).
deviations: Net of flat 1c taker fee on crossed entries (0 on maker-wait); the fee is the proximate cause of the net loss given the exit cap.
Drift read from data (reproduces Scope A T4 within 0.19c) rather than re-derived.
